name: chat_stream
description: Generate conversational responses as a real-time stream of server-sent events. Enables token-by-token display for responsive user interfaces and long-running generation tasks.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID to use for generation.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects with 'role' and 'content'.

example.content: Write a poem about the ocean.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: Must be set to true to enable streaming.

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

messages.content: Write a poem about the ocean.
